info.name: DSCommerce QA Tests
info.description: DSCommerce API QA test collection covering smoke, functional, security, authorization, negative, boundary and edge case tests.

item.name: TC-006 - Get product by invalid ID

exec: // Parse error response body once to avoid redundancy
// Expected error message returned by the API for not found resources
// Helper: Validate that response Content-Type is JSON
// Helper: Validate that error response does not expose internal implementation details
// Validate that API returns HTTP 404 for a non-existing product ID
pm.test("Status code is 404 Not Found", function () {
// Validate that error response is returned in JSON format
// Validate that response time is within acceptable threshold
// Validate minimum error response contract used by this API
pm.test("Error response contains required fields", function () {
// Validate that error response matches expected HTTP status
// Validate that error message is not empty
pm.test("Error message is not empty", function () {
// Validate that error message is coherent with product not found scenario
pm.test("Error message is coherent with product not found scenario", function () {
// Validate that request path matches the invalid product endpoint
pm.test("Error path matches requested endpoint", function () {
// Validate that success payload is not returned in error response
pm.test("Error response does not include product success payload", function () {
// Validate that error response does not expose internal implementation details
pm.test("Error response does not expose internal details", function () {

item.description: Validates public access to product catalog, including listing, search, pagination, and retrieval by ID.

item.name: Authentication

exec: // Parse response body once to avoid redundancy
// Helper: Validate that response Content-Type is JSON
// Helper: Validate that response does not expose credentials or user password
// Helper: Validate JWT structure without logging its content
// Validate that API returns HTTP 200 for a successful authentication request
// Validate that response is returned in JSON format
// Validate that response time is within acceptable threshold
pm.test("Authentication response contains required fields", function () {
// Validate that access token is present without printing it
// Validate that token type is bearer
// Validate that token expiration is present and valid
// Validate JWT format without decoding or logging sensitive content
// Validate that response does not expose credentials or password
pm.test("Response does not expose credentials or password", function () {
// Store client access token for authenticated requests without logging it
pm.test("Client access token is stored in environment", function () {

request.description: Validates that a registered client user can authenticate successfully and receive a valid access token.

item.name: TC-010 - Reject authentication with invalid password

exec: // Parse error response body once to avoid redundancy

// Validate that API rejects authentication with invalid password
pm.test("Status code is 400 Bad Request", function () {

pm.test("Authentication error response contains required fields", function () {
// Validate that error description is present and coherent
pm.test("Error description is coherent with invalid credentials", function () {
// Validate that access token is not returned for invalid authentication
pm.test("Access token is not returned", function () {
// Validate that token metadata is not returned
pm.test("Token metadata is not returned", function () {
// Validate that response does not expose credentials or internal implementation details
pm.test("Response does not expose credentials or internal details", function () {

item.description: Validates authentication flow, including token generation, invalid credentials handling, and security behavior.

item.name: User Profile
item.description: Validates that authenticated users can access their own profile data and that protected user information is not exposed without a valid token.

item.name: Orders - Authenticated User
item.description: Validates authenticated user order flows, including order creation, order retrieval, item quantities, and business rules related to checkout.

item.name: Product Management - Admin
item.description: Validates ADMIN product management permissions, including product creation, update, deletion, and validation of required product data.

item.name: Authorization and Permissions
item.description: Validates role-based access control between CLIENT and ADMIN users, ensuring proper permission enforcement.

item.name: Boundary and Edge Cases
item.description: Validates system behavior under boundary conditions, including invalid inputs, limits, and edge scenarios.

item.name: Bug Evidence
item.description: Stores requests that reproduce confirmed defects or unexpected behaviors, including evidence used for bug reports and test documentation.
